Our story

Who we are

Christ Evangelistic Church is a Spirit-filled congregation devoted to proclaiming the saving grace of Jesus Christ to all people. Founded on prayer and the uncompromising Word of God, we have grown into a thriving community of believers passionate about worship, discipleship, and outreach.

We believe in the power of the Holy Spirit to transform every life, and we are committed to making disciples who make disciples — in our city, across Kenya, and to the ends of the earth.

No matter your background or where you are in your spiritual journey, you are welcome here. Come as you are and encounter the living God.

"For I am not ashamed of the gospel, because it is the power of God that brings salvation to everyone who believes."

— Romans 1:16
What we stand on

Our core values

Four pillars that shape everything we do as a church family.

Scripture

The Bible is the inspired, authoritative Word of God. It is our final standard for faith and practice in all things.

Evangelism

We are compelled by Christ's Great Commission to preach the gospel boldly to every person, in every place.

Community

We grow together in fellowship, bearing one another's burdens and celebrating each other's victories in Christ.

Mission

We exist to serve our community and extend God's Kingdom to the ends of the earth through prayer and action.

Meet the team

Our pastoral team

Anointed leaders committed to serving God and shepherding His people with love and faithfulness.

BO

Ps. Bern Okumu Maumbe

Senior Pastor

A servant of God with a burning passion for the lost and a deep love for the local church. Leading CEC in faith, vision, and the power of the Holy Spirit.

NL

Pastor Naomi Lihavi

Associate Pastor

A gifted minister of the Word with a heart for discipleship and spiritual growth. Faithfully serving alongside the senior pastor to strengthen the church.

JO

Pastor Judith Owili

Associate Pastor

Anointed with wisdom and compassion, Pastor Judith serves the congregation with dedication, prayer, and a deep love for God's people.

MS

Morine Salmon

Youth Pastor & Praise & Worship

Spirit-filled leader raising a bold generation for Christ while also leading the church in dynamic, heartfelt worship every service.
